Computed MD5 hash of the requested password 'NP2024Secure!'. The metadata claim '91f7a6350d754bbcb11596708b76dfb3' is actually the MD5 hash for 'admin123', which contradicts the explicit instructions.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the user profile details (Sarah Mitchell, smitchell, phy, etc.) are synthetically generated and explicitly provided in the prompt instructions. Discovered a critical defect where the required password 'NP2024Secure!' has an MD5 hash of '974d388ccf15bef588d1cca58ce4ef3a', but the metadata and verifier script expect '91f7a6350d754bbcb11596708b76dfb3' (which is the MD5 hash for 'admin123'). This causes the verifier to incorrectly evaluate the password hash if the agent correctly follows the prompt instructions.
